title: ORBUS REBORN
description: Modpack based around the Minecolonies mod with a few extra enhancements for the Orbus Reborn server.
body:
Orbus Reborn is a modpack that takes the game beyond its vanilla survival roots, offering players a rich and expansive experience focused on empire-building, supernatural abilities, and exploration.
  Notable mods include:
- Minecolonies
- Epic Knights: Sheilds Armor and Weapons
- Farmer's Delight
- Vampirism
- Small Ships
  Several addons and others are included.
